name: Butter Payments
description: ML-powered failed-payment recovery platform analyzing decline codes and automating retry strategies.

seo.title: Butter Payments — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Butter Payments: ML-powered failed-payment recovery platform analyzing decline codes and automating retry strategies.

when_to_use: ML-powered failed subscription payment recovery via smart retry scheduling
Decline code analysis to optimize card retry timing and reduce churn
Recovering involuntary churn from expired or declined cards at renewal
Automated dunning alternative that avoids pestering customers directly

pros: ML models trained on decline-code patterns
Automates retry scheduling per card and issuer
Clear ROI tied to recovered revenue
cons: Point solution — not a full orchestrator
Revenue-share pricing can get expensive at scale
Primarily useful for subscription and recurring flows
Requires data access that some PSPs gate
review.verdict: Worthwhile bolt-on for subscription businesses losing revenue to soft declines; not a replacement for orchestration.
review.best_for: Subscription and card-on-file merchants with meaningful involuntary churn from declines.
review.not_for: One-time e-commerce checkouts or teams without a recurring billing problem.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
